heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly sunny, except variable clouds northeast, with the chance of early sprinkle near the Québec border. Highs in the mid to upper 70s, some lower 70s northeast and in the Adirondacks. West winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: A few evening clouds northeast, otherwise mostly clear. Areas of valley fog late. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s, mid 40s in northern cold hollows. Winds becoming light and variable.

heading: Friday
text: Areas of valley fog early, then mostly sunny. Highs in the upper 70s to lower 80s, some mid 70s northeast and in the Adirondacks. South to southwest at 5 to 10 mph.
